race.comment: PUISSANCE PLAYBOY (2) gets the blinkers on for the first time today after some strong performances in defeat recently. Back to 1400m here doesn't look an issue and he's got good early speed to offset the tricky draw. Looks to be improving with racing and this presents as a golden opportunity to notch up his maiden win. QUEEN OF CHAOS (9) missed by 0.5L over the 1300m trip here last time out, though it was a good return to form. Faithfull remaining in the saddle is a positive sign and she's placed 2/4 at this trip. She can be in the finish again. REIGN IN THE CASH (1) bounced back to form last start when only 0.3L off the winner over the mile. Back in trip slightly is a bit of a query, though Wheatley's booking is a good push for his chances. SNOW GEM (5) won't be far away on recent form. SECRET INTENT (10) can feature in the finish.
